description: Configure two new public Canned Responses in the Rocket.Chat Omnichannel administration area using the credentials Username: 'admin' and Password: 'Admin1234!'. Create a public response with the shortcut '!refund_policy' and the text: 'Full refunds are available for 30 days after purchase. Please visit https://docs.rocket.chat/refunds for details.' Additionally, create a public response with the shortcut '!office_hours' and the text: 'Support agents are available Monday through Friday, 09:00 to 17:00 UTC.'

responses.text: Full refunds are available for 30 days after purchase. Please visit https://docs.rocket.chat/refunds for details.
Support agents are available Monday through Friday, 09:00 to 17:00 UTC.
